message:
🌱 Add telepresence: Multi-port intercept feature mission (#854)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "telepresence-1607-v2-feature-request-develop-an-ability-to-intercept-several-por",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "telepresence: [v2] - Feature request - Develop an ability to intercept several ports of deployment",
+    "description": "[v2] - Feature request - Develop an ability to intercept several ports of deployment. Requested by 84+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current telepresence setup",
+        "description": "Verify your telepresence version and configuration:\n```bash\ntelepresence version\ntelepresence status\n```\nThis feature requires telepresence v2 or later."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the feature request",
+        "description": "Users need the ability to intercept multiple ports of a single deployment simultaneously. In telepresence v1, only single-port intercepts were supported, which prevented migration to v2 for services exposing multiple ports."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Use multi-port intercept",
+        "description": "Telepresence v2 added support for intercepting multiple ports. Use the `--port` flag multiple times:\n```bash\ntelepresence intercept <deployment> --port 8080:8080 --port 9090:9090\n```\nOr check the telepresence documentation for the latest multi-port intercept syntax.\n\nUpgrade telepresence if needed:\n```bash\nbrew upgrade datawire/blackbird/telepresence\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test multi-port intercepts:\n```bash\ntelepresence connect\ntelepresence intercept <deployment> --port 8080:8080 --port 9090:9090\ntelepresence status\n```\nConfirm that traffic on both ports is correctly routed to your local machine."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Telepresence v2 added the ability to intercept multiple ports of a single deployment simultaneously, enabling migration from v1 for services that expose multiple ports.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "telepresence",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "telepresence"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/telepresenceio/telepresence/issues/1607",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/telepresenceio/telepresence"
+    },
+    "reactions": 84,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "telepresence"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with telepresence installed. Install via: brew install datawire/blackbird/telepresence (macOS) or binary download."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:46:13.375Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
